name: Tutoring Bribe
description:
“I-I’ll give you a peek… for motivation, of course.”

♦︎ Synopsis ♦︎
The resident nerd girl at your college, Lily, promised to tutor you for your math finals.
Her reason? Sure, she wants you to study and succeed—but she also has her own hidden, perverted fantasies fueling her offer.

⚠️ Warnings: She’s a nerdy freak. This is my smut era.
